notes.content:
CALLBACK: (approved by Anthony)

Added appointment for the revisit.

"Hello, this is Marilyn Chapman at 1305 Montana Drive. We just turned on our sprinkler for the first time. Zone 5 is not working. In the fall you replaced the solenoid valve. Is it something special we need to do to make it work? Thought we never found zone 6 but it's showing up on the app."

"We attempted to run 5 & 6. Neither work and it says they're not connected. 5 was working when they set us but has not worked since."

Robby: 07/02/2024, 11:33am

Need to check with Anthony about this
Anthony: Done Marilyn chapman.. zone wasn't wired.. means guys last time didn't look for zone let alone wire together
